Bash(python -c "
import json
with open\('C:/Dev/NorskTale/client/NorskTale/obj/x64/Debug/net9.0-windows10.0.22621.0/input.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
for k in d:
    v = d[k]
    if isinstance\(v, list\):
        print\(k, ':', len\(v\), 'items'\)
    else:
        print\(k, ':', v\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json
with open\('C:/Dev/NorskTale/client/NorskTale/obj/x64/Debug/net9.0-windows10.0.22621.0/input.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
print\('XamlApplications:'\)
for x in d.get\('XamlApplications', []\):
    print\(' ', x\)
print\('XamlPages:'\)
for x in d.get\('XamlPages', []\):
    print\(' ', x\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
function Make-Png\(\\$path, \\$w, \\$h\) {
    \\$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap \\$w, \\$h
    \\$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bmp\)
    \\$g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(0,100,160,255\)\)
    \\$g.Dispose\(\)
    \\$bmp.Save\(\\$path, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
    \\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
}
Make-Png 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\NorskTale\\Assets\\Square44x44Logo.png' 44 44
Make-Png 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\NorskTale\\Assets\\Square150x150Logo.png' 150 150
Make-Png 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\NorskTale\\Assets\\Wide310x150Logo.png' 310 150
Make-Png 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\NorskTale\\Assets\\SplashScreen.png' 620 300
Make-Png 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\NorskTale\\Assets\\StoreLogo.png' 50 50
Write-Host 'done'
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing

function Make-Ico {
    param\([string]$Path, [int]$R, [int]$G, [int]$B\)

    $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 16, 16
    $g   = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\)
    $g.SmoothingMode = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.SmoothingMode]::AntiAlias
    $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::Transparent\)
    $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, $R, $G, $B\)\)
    $g.FillEllipse\($brush, 1, 1, 14, 14\)
    $g.Dispose\(\)

    \\$handle = \\$bmp.GetHicon\(\)
    \\$icon   = [System.Drawing.Icon]::FromHandle\(\\$handle\)
    \\$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open\(\\$Path, 'Create'\)
    \\$icon.Save\(\\$stream\)
    \\$stream.Close\(\)
    \\$icon.Dispose\(\)
    \\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
    Write-Host \\"Created \\$Path\\"
}

\\$assets = 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\LocalWhisperer\\Assets'
Make-Ico \\"\\$assets\\tray-idle.ico\\"       100 130 200   # blå-grå
Make-Ico \\"\\$assets\\tray-listening.ico\\"  220  50  50   # rød
Make-Ico \\"\\$assets\\tray-processing.ico\\" 220 140  30   # oransje
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command @'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing

function Make-Ico\([string]$Path, [int]$R, [int]$G, [int]$B\) {
    $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 16, 16
    $gr  = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\)
    $gr.SmoothingMode = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.SmoothingMode]::AntiAlias
    $gr.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::Transparent\)
    $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, $R, $G, $B\)\)
    $gr.FillEllipse\($brush, 1, 1, 14, 14\)
    $gr.Dispose\(\)
    $handle = $bmp.GetHicon\(\)
    $icon   = [System.Drawing.Icon]::FromHandle\($handle\)
    $stream = [System.IO.File]::Open\($Path, [System.IO.FileMode]::Create\)
    $icon.Save\($stream\)
    $stream.Close\(\)
    $icon.Dispose\(\)
    $bmp.Dispose\(\)
    Write-Host "Created $Path"
}

$assets = 'C:\\Dev\\NorskTale\\client\\LocalWhisperer\\Assets'
Make-Ico "$assets\\tray-idle.ico"       100 130 200
Make-Ico "$assets\\tray-listening.ico"  220  50  50
Make-Ico "$assets\\tray-processing.ico" 220 140  30
'@)
